---
title: "Reflexions on data preparation workflow in R"
description: |
  Here is an attempt at clarifying my thoughts with respect to coding in the context of preparing data for research projects.
categories:
  - R
author: Alexandre Courtiol
preview: great_tit.jpg
output: distill::distill_article
repository_url: https://github.com/data-zoo-gang/DZG_website
draft: true
---
